name: kidneycompass-clinical-knowledge
description: Scoped MCP server serving versioned UK CKD guideline text (KDIGO 2024, NICE NG203/TAs, UKKA lifestyle, AKI thresholds, KFRE calibration) from spec/guidelines/. Exact-term + full-text retrieval so precise items (thresholds, ACR in mg/mmol, drug names, referral criteria) are looked up, not recalled from model memory.

tools.name: lookup_guideline
tools.description: Look up guideline text by query; modes exact|fulltext|auto. Returns cited, versioned passages.

tools.name: list_guideline_sources
tools.description: List curated guideline sources and their versions.

notes: Consumed via ADK McpToolset over stdio (app/mcp_client.py). Vector retrieval is a documented future addition; current modes are exact-term and full-text. Least-privilege: only the two read-only lookup tools are exposed (tool_filter).
